findings.title: Mission-close proof skips the blocking P4 full-suite contract
findings.rationale: The approved blueprint marks P4 as a blocking mission proof row and specifies `cargo test -p codex1` as the required evidence for the existing test suite remaining green. The mission-close bundle and frozen snapshot do not include P4 in cross-spec claims and record only targeted `runtime_internal` and `qualification_cli` test rows plus fmt/check/validators. The latest included receipt likewise records targeted `qualification_cli`, fmt, and check rows, not the blueprint-required full `cargo test -p codex1` row. Without that exact blocking proof row represented in the close evidence, the integrated outcome cannot honestly claim every blueprint proof contract is satisfied.
findings.suggested_next_action: Run and record the blueprint-required `cargo test -p codex1` proof row, include P4 in the mission-close checked claims/evidence, regenerate the close evidence snapshot, and rerun mission-close review.
